# Kwaivgi Kling Lipsync Audio To Video ## Parameters ### Task Submission Parameters #### Request Parameters
ParameterTypeRequiredDefaultRange / OptionsDescription
audiostringYes--The URL pointing to the audio file that will be used for generating synchronized lip movements. Supported audio file formats: .mp3/.wav/.m4a/.aac, with a maximum file size of 5MB.
videostringYes-The URL of the video file for generating synchronized lip movements.
#### Response Parameters
codeintegerHTTP status code
